summary: Iteration 91: Tested CineBoard popup menu with 3 options (Film, Serie TV, Anime), Sequel Pipeline, Emittente TV broadcast system, and Production Menu with 5 buttons. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend tests passed including CineBoard dropdown navigation to /social, /social?view=series, /social?view=anime. Production menu shows correct 3-column grid with Film, Sequel, Serie TV, Anime, La Tua TV buttons.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed sequel created and discarded during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User fandrex1@gmail.com has studio_serie_tv and studio_anime unlocked but NOT emittente_tv. User has 22 eligible films for sequels. User has 1 completed sequel ('Il Commissario Thriller: La Vendetta' with 52.3 quality) and 1 sequel in production ('Il Commissario Thriller: Un giorno qualunque'). CineBoard popup works in top navbar with Trophy icon. Production menu in mobile bottom nav shows 5 buttons: Film (yellow), Sequel (amber), Serie TV (blue), Anime (orange), La Tua TV (emerald/locked).

Backend API Tests (pytest).test_cineboard_series_weekly_structure: PASSED - Response contains series array with rank, title, quality_score
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_eligible_films_structure: PASSED - Returns 22 films with sequel_count, next_sequel_number, saga_bonus_percent
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_create_sequel_success: PASSED - Creates sequel in 'casting' status, then cleaned up
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_unlock_status_returns_200: PASSED - Returns has_production_studio, has_studio_serie_tv, has_studio_anime, has_emittente_tv
Backend API Tests (pytest).test_cleanup_test_sequels: PASSED - Cleaned up TEST_ prefixed sequels

Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_02_cineboard_popup_visible: PASSED - CineBoard dropdown menu opens from Trophy button
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_03_cineboard_3_options: PASSED - Film, Serie TV, Anime options found in dropdown
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_05_cineboard_series_navigation: PASSED - Serie TV option navigates to /social?view=series
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_06_cineboard_anime_navigation: PASSED - Anime option navigates to /social?view=anime with 'Trend Anime' title
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_07_production_menu_5_buttons: PASSED - Production menu shows Film, Sequel, Serie TV, Anime, La Tua TV buttons
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_08_sequel_pipeline_page: PASSED - /create-sequel shows Pipeline Sequel title with active sequel in production
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_09_emittente_tv_locked: PASSED - /my-tv shows locked page with Level 18, Fame 200, $5M cost requirements

features_verified.cineboard_popup_in_navbar: VERIFIED - Trophy button opens dropdown with 3 options: Film, Serie TV, Anime
features_verified.cineboard_series_route: VERIFIED - Navigates to /social?view=series, shows 'Trend Serie TV' page
features_verified.cineboard_anime_route: VERIFIED - Navigates to /social?view=anime, shows 'Trend Anime' page
features_verified.production_menu_5_buttons: VERIFIED - Shows Film, Sequel, Serie TV, Anime, La Tua TV in 3-column grid
features_verified.sequel_eligible_films: VERIFIED - /api/sequel-pipeline/eligible-films returns 22 films with sequel info
features_verified.sequel_create_endpoint: VERIFIED - /api/sequel-pipeline/create creates sequel with inherited cast
features_verified.sequel_pipeline_page: VERIFIED - SequelPipeline page shows film selection and subtitle input
features_verified.sequel_pipeline_ui: VERIFIED - Shows active sequel with status, saga bonus, production progress
features_verified.emittente_tv_locked_page: VERIFIED - /my-tv shows locked state with requirements
